content: Reviewed and merged #602. Evidence: diff was focused to value-bearing gridcell labels and removing the broad `#REF!` pre-tokenization check; 17/17 Node tests passed; file:// browser smoke had no console errors. Merge completed at https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/602.

**Dave:** PR #602 is merged: https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/602. I verified the quoted `#REF!` regression is fixed on main: Node tests now pass 19/19, browser tests PASS under file://, app opens under file://, and `agent-browser errors` is empty. I left the review/merge comment on the PR.
